info.title: Fun Translations API
info.description: Fun Translations offers 160+ translation APIs including Yoda, Shakespeare, Pirate, Klingon, Morse Code, and many more creative text translators. RESTful JSON API with API key authentication.

post.summary: Translate text using any available translator
post.description: Translate text to the specified translation style. Over 160 translators are available including Yoda, Shakespeare, Pirate, Morse Code, and many more.

parameters.name: translation
parameters.description: Translation type slug (e.g., yodish, pirate-speak, morse-code)

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid text parameter

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

post.summary: Translate text to Cockney Londoner Accent
post.description: Translate text to Cockney Londoner Accent

post.summary: Translate text to Gen Z Zoomer
post.description: Translate text to Gen Z Zoomer

post.summary: Translate text to Elmer Fudd Speak
post.description: Translate text to Elmer Fudd Speak

bearerAuth.description: API key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header
